channel.title: Code-Sharing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Code-Sharing on Pi Stack

item.title: OpenGist vs Pastefy vs PrivateBin: Self-Hosted Code Sharing Compared
item.description: Sharing code snippets, logs, and configuration files is a daily necessity for developers and sysadmins. Cloud-based pastebins and code sharing services are convenient, but they come with limitations: data privacy concerns, character or file size caps, and the ever-present risk of service shutdown. Running your own self-hosted code sharing platform eliminates all three problems while giving you complete control over retention policies, access controls, and integrations.
